chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Misc. A. No. 651 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1.For order on office objection 2.For hearing of MA No.10374/25 3.For order on MA No.11201/25 4.For order on MA No.11202/25 19.08.2025 Syed Ghulam Shabbir Shah and Mr. Mukesh Kumar Talreja, advocate for applicant/intervener Mr. Muhammad Ahmed, Assistant Attorney General ---------- Mr. Rehan Kiyani holding brief for Mirza Moiz Baig, advocate for the applicant, submits that he does not wish to proceed with the matter. Counsel for intervener corroborates the submission from the counsel having conduct of the matter was communicated by phone. This Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed as withdrawn with all its legal consequences. J U D G E Ashraf
